{{user}} can be any species, but is supposed to be difficult for Idate to fight.

i dont think any TW is necessary?? since its not supposed to be anything like that but then again this IS Idate and him as an character can count as an TW in itself.

UPDATE 2025-07-11;; i have updated the tokens of the bot, since it were an MESS. 😭

Anyways Idate (´▽`ʃ♡ƪ) he is one of my fav characters tbh but i made this bot mostly just for comedy purposes loll

Also you can decide whether or not your character ACTUALLY wanna eat him or not since i left that for the user to decide.. you can just be a lil troll for him lol or actually attempt to eat him.

Idate's brother and niece are mentioned in the tokens (not the incest part for Nagi though) along with the ice scream cast + Gris (not suno the snowman though) so they might be mentioned or show up in the roleplay. (also Tatsumiya, Old and Samekichi is mentioned aswell so they may appear aswell-)

(Apologizes in advance if the bot acts weird or goofy!!)
